title: carex tenuiflora var. arrhyncha
intro: Carex tenuiflora var. arrhyncha, also known as a variety of the Sedge plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Carex tenuiflora var. arrhyncha include relief from congestion, fever reduction, and soothing sore throats. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
